codeReview.summary: Feature successfully normalizes all repository references from ui-md-standard to Ola-Turmo/UI.md across documentation files. Changes include README.md (clone URL), AGENTS.md (SPEC.md link), CONTRIBUTING.md (fork clone URL), and tooling/vscode-extension/README.md. Additionally updated validation JSON assertion files.

validationChecks.description: All documentation files reference github.com/Ola-Turmo/UI.md not github.com/Ola-Turmo/ui-md-standard
validationChecks.evidence: grep -r 'github\.com.*ui-md-standard' found zero matches in all .md files. Confirmed correct references in: README.md:143 (clone URL), AGENTS.md:135 (SPEC.md link), CONTRIBUTING.md:38 (fork clone URL), tooling/vscode-extension/README.md:3,34 (repo link and clone URL)

validationChecks.description: README.md, AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md have no broken links
validationChecks.evidence: Verified all HTTP links in the three specified files: README.md has valid GitHub clone URL, shields.io badges, opensource.org license link; AGENTS.md has valid GitHub SPEC.md link; CONTRIBUTING.md has valid GitHub fork clone URL with variable username. All external links (Node.js, VS Code, shields.io, opensource.org) are well-formed URLs to known valid domains.

summary: Review PASS. Feature correctly updates all repository references from ui-md-standard to Ola-Turmo/UI.md in documentation files. Zero occurrences of incorrect GitHub URL found. All links verified to be properly formatted.
